algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived commercial parking garage sprinkler coverage
algorithm_input.design_intent: Select commercial parking garage sprinkler coverage while balancing system cost against fire-protection reliability.

scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Parking garage sprinkler applicability judgment task.

query_preferences.meaning: balance sprinkler cost and fire-protection reliability

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.task_semantics_note: Rule applicability, precedence, categorical, or system-capability semantics dominate this task; it is not a pure continuous numeric optimization task.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Parking garage sprinkler applicability judgment task.
